topics.title: Iran Negotiations
topics.summary: Donald Trump is actively involved in negotiations with Iran, emphasizing that he will not rush into a deal and that the current discussions are proceeding in a constructive manner. He contrasts his approach with that of the previous administration, asserting that his deal will prevent Iran from developing nuclear weapons. The situation remains fluid as both sides continue to negotiate key terms.
topics.summaryZh: 唐纳德·特朗普积极参与与伊朗的谈判，强调他不会急于达成协议，并表示当前的讨论正在以建设性的方式进行。他将自己的方法与前任政府的做法进行对比，声称他的协议将阻止伊朗发展核武器。随着双方继续谈判关键条款，局势仍在不断变化。

topics.title: Political Endorsements
topics.summary: Trump has endorsed Ty Masterson for the Kansas governor's race, highlighting his qualifications and commitment to conservative values. This endorsement aligns with Trump's ongoing efforts to support candidates who share his America First agenda ahead of the upcoming elections.
topics.summaryZh: 特朗普已支持泰·马斯特森参加堪萨斯州州长竞选，强调他的资历和对保守价值观的承诺。这一支持与特朗普在即将到来的选举中继续支持与他共享美国优先议程的候选人的努力相一致。

topics.title: Public Safety Concerns
topics.summary: In light of a recent shooting incident near the White House, Trump expressed gratitude towards the Secret Service and law enforcement for their swift response. He emphasized the importance of national security and the need for secure spaces for future presidents.
topics.summaryZh: 鉴于白宫附近最近发生的枪击事件，特朗普对特勤局和执法部门的迅速反应表示感谢。他强调国家安全的重要性以及为未来总统提供安全空间的必要性。

summary24h.text: 感谢特勤局和执法部门对白宫附近枪击事件的迅速反应。
在社交媒体上发布了关于与伊朗的谈判进展的声明。
在社交媒体上发布了对堪萨斯州州长候选人泰·马斯特森的支持声明。

socialMedia.text: It is my Great Honor to endorse Ty Masterson, a fantastic Candidate running to be the next Governor of the Great State of Kansas, a place I love and WON BIG in 2016, 2020, and 2024! Ty will run on the Republican “ticket” with my friend, the Great U.S. Senator Roger Marshall, who, along with many America First Patriots in Kansas, strongly believe in him.A highly successful Small Business Owner and Entrepreneur, and Kansas’ very popular State Senate President, Ty has dedicated his life to serving his Community. As your next Governor, Ty will work tirelessly to Champion Kansas Values, Promote our Amazing Farmers and Ranchers, Grow our Economy, Cut Taxes and Regulations, Advance MADE IN THE U.S.A., Unleash American Energy DOMINANCE, Keep our Border SECURE, Stop Migrant Crime, Ensure LAW AND ORDER, Support our Brave Military, Veterans, and Law Enforcement, Safeguard our Elections, and Defend our always under siege Second Amendment.Ty Masterson has my Complete and Total Endorsement to be the next Governor of Kansas — HE WILL NEVER LET YOU DOWN!
socialMedia.textZh: 我非常荣幸地支持泰·马斯特森（Ty Masterson），他是一位出色的候选人，正在竞选堪萨斯州下任州长，这是我热爱的地方，我在2016年、2020年和2024年都取得了巨大的胜利！泰将与我的朋友、伟大的美国参议员罗杰·马歇尔（Roger Marshall）一起代表共和党竞选，他和许多在堪萨斯的美国优先爱国者都坚定地相信他。作为一位成功的小企业主和企业家，以及堪萨斯州非常受欢迎的州参议院院长，泰将毕生致力于服务社区。作为你们的下任州长，泰将不遗余力地倡导堪萨斯的价值观，促进我们了不起的农民和牧场主，发展我们的经济，减税和放松监管，推动“美国制造”，释放美国能源的主导地位，确保我们的边界安全，制止移民犯罪，维护法律和秩序，支持我们勇敢的军队、退伍军人和执法人员，保障我们的选举，捍卫我们始终受到攻击的第二修正案。泰·马斯特森获得了我对他成为堪萨斯州下任州长的完全和全力支持——他绝不会让你失望！

socialMedia.text: If I make a deal with Iran, it will be a good and proper one, not like the one made by Obama, which gave Iran massive amounts of CASH, and a clear and open path to a Nuclear Weapon. Our deal is the exact opposite, but nobody has seen it, or knows what it is. It isn’t even fully negotiated yet. So don’t listen to the losers, who are critical about something they know nothing about. Unlike those before me who should have solved this problem many years ago, I don’t make bad deals! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 如果我与伊朗达成协议，那将是一个良好而合适的协议，而不是像奥巴马所达成的那种协议，那种协议给了伊朗大量现金，并为其发展核武器提供了明确和开放的道路。我们的协议恰恰相反，但没有人见过，也不知道是什么。协议甚至还没有完全谈妥。所以不要听那些对他们一无所知的失败者的批评。与我之前的那些人不同，他们本该在多年前解决这个问题，我不会达成糟糕的协议！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: One of the worst deals ever made by our Country was the Iran Nuclear Deal, put forth and signed into existence by Barack Hussein Obama and the rank amateurs of the Obama Administration. It was a direct path to Iran developing a Nuclear Weapon. Not so with the transaction currently being negotiated with Iran by the Trump Administration - THE EXACT OPPOSITE, in fact! The negotiations are proceeding in an orderly and constructive manner, and I have informed my representatives not to rush into a deal in that time is on our side. The Blockade will remain in full force and effect until an agreement is reached, certified, and signed. Both sides must take their time and get it right. There can be no mistakes! Our relationship with Iran is becoming a much more professional and productive one. They must understand, however, that they cannot develop or procure a Nuclear Weapon or Bomb. I would like to thank, thus far, all of the countries of the Middle East for their support and cooperation, which will be further enhanced and strengthened by their joining the Nations of the historic Abraham Accords and, who knows, perhaps the Islamic Republic of Iran would like to join, as well! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 我们国家曾经达成的最糟糕的协议之一就是伊朗核协议，由巴拉克·侯赛因·奥巴马（Barack Hussein Obama）和奥巴马政府的业余人士提出并签署。这是一条直接通往伊朗发展核武器的道路。与特朗普政府目前正在与伊朗谈判的交易完全相反！谈判正在有序和建设性地进行，我已通知我的代表们不要急于达成协议，因为时间在我们这边。封锁将继续全面生效，直到达成协议、认证并签署。双方必须花时间确保协议的正确性。不能有任何错误！我们与伊朗的关系正在变得更加专业和富有成效。然而，他们必须明白，他们不能发展或获取核武器或炸弹。我想感谢迄今为止所有中东国家的支持与合作，这将通过他们加入历史性的亚伯拉罕协议国家而进一步增强和加强，谁知道，也许伊朗伊斯兰共和国也想加入！感谢您对此事的关注。总统唐纳德·J·特朗普

socialMedia.text: The Dumocrats don’t want to allow FISHING. Fighting us in Court. Bad for the environment. Amazing! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 民主党人不想允许钓鱼。他们在法庭上与我们对抗。这对环境有害。真是惊人！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: “President Xi and President Trump are AMAZING!”
socialMedia.textZh: “习主席和特朗普总统真是太棒了！”

socialMedia.text: “President Xi and President Trump are AMAZING!”
socialMedia.textZh: “习主席和特朗普总统真是太棒了！”

socialMedia.text: This is a bad (Sick!) group of people. Very destructive to our great Nation. Caused tremendous damage through Weaponization! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 这是一群糟糕（病态！）的人。对我们伟大的国家造成了极大的破坏。通过武器化造成了巨大的损害！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: “Birthright Citizenship is suicide for our Country!” Mark Levin
socialMedia.textZh: “出生公民权对我们的国家来说是自杀！”马克·莱文

socialMedia.text: Thank you to our great Secret Service and Law Enforcement for the swift and professional action taken this evening against a gunman near the White House, who had a violent history and possible obsession with our Country’s most cherished structure. The gunman is dead after an exchange of gunfire with Secret Service Agents near the White House gates. This event is one month removed from the White House Correspondent’Dinner shooting, and goes to show how important it is, for all future Presidents, to get, what will be, the most safe and secure space of its kind ever built in Washington, D.C. The National Security of our Country demands it!
socialMedia.textZh: 感谢我们伟大的特勤局和执法部门，今晚对一名在白宫附近的枪手采取了迅速而专业的行动，该枪手有暴力历史，并可能对我们国家最珍贵的建筑物产生了痴迷。经过与特勤局特工在白宫大门附近的交火后，枪手已死亡。这一事件距离白宫记者晚宴的枪击事件已过去一个月，表明对所有未来总统来说，确保华盛顿特区建立最安全、最保安的空间是多么重要。我们国家的国家安全要求如此！

socialMedia.text: The Democrats just released an “Autopsy” of their 2024 Presidential Campaign, typos and all, but they refused to discuss two very important words, BAD POLICY. The candidates, Sleepy Joe and then, Kamala, weren’t so “HOT” either! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 民主党刚刚发布了他们2024年总统竞选的“尸检报告”，包括错别字，但他们拒绝讨论两个非常重要的词，糟糕的政策。候选人，昏昏欲睡的乔和卡马拉，也没那么“火热”！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: I am in the Oval Office at the White House where we just had a very good call with President Mohammed bin Salman Al Saud, of Saudi Arabia, Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, of The United Arab Emirates, Emir Tamim bin Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, Prime Minister Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim bin Jaber Al Thani, and Minister Ali al-Thawadi, of Qatar, Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir Ahmed Shah, of Pakistan, President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, of Türkiye, President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi, of Egypt, King Abdullah II, of Jordan, and King Hamad bin Isa Al Khalifa, of Bahrain, concerning the Islamic Republic of Iran, and all things related to a Memorandum of Understanding pertaining to PEACE. An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries, as listed. Separately, I had a call with Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel, which, likewise, went very well. Final aspects and details of the Deal are currently being discussed, and will be announced shortly. In addition to many other elements of the Agreement, the Strait of Hormuz will be opened. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 我在白宫的椭圆形办公室，刚刚与沙特阿拉伯的穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼（Mohammed bin Salman Al Saud）总统、阿联酋的穆罕默德·本·扎耶德·阿尔·纳哈扬（Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan）总统、卡塔尔的塔米姆·本·哈马德·阿尔·萨尼（Tamim bin Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani）埃米尔、穆罕默德·本·阿卜杜拉赫曼·本·贾西姆·本·贾伯·阿尔·萨尼（Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim bin Jaber Al Thani）总理，以及卡塔尔的阿里·阿尔·萨瓦迪（Ali al-Thawadi）部长、巴基斯坦的赛义德·阿西姆·穆尼尔·艾哈迈德·沙赫（Syed Asim Munir Ahmed Shah）元帅、土耳其的雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安（Recep Tayyip Erdoğan）总统、埃及的阿卜杜勒·法塔赫·塞西（Abdel Fattah El-Sisi）总统、约旦的阿卜杜拉二世国王（King Abdullah II）和巴林的哈马德·本·伊萨·阿尔·哈利法（Hamad bin Isa Al Khalifa）国王，讨论伊朗伊斯兰共和国及与和平相关的谅解备忘录。协议已基本谈妥，待美国、伊朗伊斯兰共和国及其他列出的国家最终确认。此外，我还与以色列的内塔尼亚胡总理进行了通话，结果也非常好。协议的最终细节和方面目前正在讨论中，并将很快公布。除了协议的许多其他要素外，霍尔木兹海峡将会开放。感谢您对此事的关注！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普
